title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Device name should reject emojis and disable Done button in Device Settings > General on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth device to open Device Settings.
4. Tap on the device name field to edit it.
5. Enter one or more emoji characters (e.g., 😀, 🎧, ❤️) as the new device name.
6. Observe the state of the 'Done' button (or equivalent save/confirm button) in the editing interface.
7. If the 'Done' button is enabled, tap it to attempt to save the name.
8. Return to the Home screen and check the displayed device name.
expected: The "Done" button should be disabled when emojis are entered in the device name field. The device name should not be changed. On the Home screen, the device name should remain unchanged (the original name before editing).
